text:
The goal is at a bearing of -175 degrees, which is almost directly behind me (since my current yaw is 0 degrees). To face the goal, I need to turn around. A 180-degree turn would be ideal, but I can only turn 30 degrees at a time. Turning left or right will help me orient towards the goal. Since -175 is close to -180, I should start turning in the direction that reduces the angle difference. Turning left (negative direction) or right (positive direction) by 30 degrees will help me get closer to the target bearing. Let's choose TURN_LEFT to start rotating towards the goal.

TURN_LEFT
